description: Expected local Vitest failures caused only by intentionally absent credentials or deployment environment values. Entries are exact file::test names; additions require audit review.
expectedFailures: server/ciSecrets.test.ts::CI secrets validation > APP_SESSION_SECRET is set with sufficient length (min 44 chars)
server/ciSecrets.test.ts::CI secrets validation > All required GitHub Actions secrets are present and correctly formatted
server/ciSecrets.test.ts::CI secrets validation > DATABASE_URL is set and matches MySQL connection string format
server/ciSecrets.test.ts::CI secrets validation > NBA_SHEET_ID is set and matches Google Sheets ID format
server/ciSecrets.test.ts::CI secrets validation > PUBLIC_ORIGIN is set and has no trailing slash
server/claude.test.ts::Claude Fable 5 Integration > Anthropic credentials are set (API key or AI Gateway auth token)
server/discord.bot.token.test.ts::Discord Bot Token Validation > DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN is accepted by Discord REST API (/users/@me)
server/discord.bot.token.test.ts::Discord Bot Token Validation > DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN is set in environment
server/discordAuth.test.ts::PUBLIC_ORIGIN env var > ENV.publicOrigin is set (required to prevent Cloud Run hostname in redirect_uri)
server/discordAuth.test.ts::PUBLIC_ORIGIN env var > redirect_uri built from PUBLIC_ORIGIN matches Discord Portal registration
server/email.test.ts::Gmail SMTP credentials > should authenticate successfully with GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD
server/nbaSheetId.test.ts::NBA_SHEET_ID env var > NBA_SHEET_ID is set and non-empty
server/nbaSheetId.test.ts::NBA_SHEET_ID env var > NBA_SHEET_ID matches Google Sheets ID format (alphanumeric + hyphens/underscores, 20+ chars)
server/nbaSheetId.test.ts::nbaModelSync startup guard > ENV.nbaSheetId is set before nbaModelSync module loads
server/vsinCredentials.test.ts::VSiN credentials > VSIN_EMAIL is set and non-empty
server/vsinCredentials.test.ts::VSiN credentials > VSIN_EMAIL looks like a valid email address
server/vsinCredentials.test.ts::VSiN credentials > VSIN_PASSWORD is set and non-empty
